recommendations:
Dan Maddox

Eero is extraordinarily driven to achieve business goals and is willing to go the extra mile to ensure success. Eero initially recruited me to Elisa Videra when he was heading up the UK start up. Since that day I had the pleasure to work with him on a number of large bids/projects. With each and every project, Eero was the key to success, always willing to help and ensure both the customers and Videras expectations were all met. I would not hesitate to recommend him for any position.
